items.title_en: Ford rehires 350 engineers after AI fails to preserve expertise or train juniors
items.title_zh: 福特在 AI 未能保留专业知识或培训新人后重新雇用 350 名工程师
items.summary_en: Ford is rehiring about 350 engineers after AI systems didn't preserve expertise or effectively train junior staff. The episode highlights how AI can’t substitute hands-on know-how in complex manufacturing, and underscores the risk of relying on automation to transfer tacit knowledge. It also shows how shortfalls in automation can force costly backfills.
items.summary_zh: 福特在尝试让 AI 保留专业知识和培训新人后，重新雇用了约 350 名工程师。这一事件凸显了在复杂制造场景中，AI 无法取代人类的实际经验；同时也揭示了将隐性知识完全依赖于自动化传承的风险，以及因此产生的人力成本上升。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made Google Trends for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of comments
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 18 年评论做成 Hacker News 的 Google 趋势
items.summary_en: A hobbyist built a Google Trends-style tool for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of HN comments. It lets you track topic popularity, spikes around events, and compare keywords over time. Demonstrates how public datasets can be mined for long-term trend analysis without official APIs.
items.summary_zh: 一位热爱者通过对 18 年 Hacker News 评论进行索引，打造了一个类似 Google Trends 的趋势分析工具。它可以追踪话题热度、事件引发的峰值，并对比不同关键词在时间轴上的变化，展示了在没有官方 API 的情况下对公开数据进行长期趋势分析的可行性。

items.title_en: Countries are competing to see which can carry out mass surveillance the best
items.title_zh: 各国竞相展开大规模监控，看谁做得最好
items.summary_en: A Mullvad piece argues that countries are competing to deploy and expand mass surveillance capabilities, often under the banner of national security. It highlights the privacy costs, regulatory gaps, and the need for resilient privacy protections and oversight.
items.summary_zh: 《Mullvad》文章指出各国正在竞相扩展大规模监控能力，常以国家安全为名。文中强调隐私成本与监管缺口，以及加强隐私保护与监督的必要性。

items.title_en: Apple increases MacBook and iPad prices by 20%
items.title_zh: 苹果将 MacBook 与 iPad 价格大幅上调约 20%
items.summary_en: Apple raised prices across MacBook and iPad by about 20%, signaling ongoing pricing power as demand remains robust. The move comes amid inflationary pressures and stronger premium segments, potentially boosting margins but risking slower consumer uptake and competitiveness.
items.summary_zh: 苹果在 MacBook 与 iPad 上调约 20% 的价格，显示出在需求仍然强劲的环境中对定价的掌控力增强。此举可能提高毛利，但也可能抬升价格对消费意愿的影响并影响竞争力。

items.title_en: LastPass notifies users of yet another data breach
items.title_zh: LastPass 再次通知用户数据泄露
items.summary_en: LastPass alerts users to another data breach, underscoring the enduring security risks in credential managers. The update reinforces the case for enabling multi-factor authentication, using device-based security keys, and adopting zero-trust practices for sensitive accounts.
items.summary_zh: LastPass 再次警示用户发生数据泄露，凸显凭证管理工具持续存在的安全风险。此次更新强调开启多因素认证、使用基于设备的安全密钥，以及对敏感账户实行零信任策略的重要性。

items.title_en: Half-Life 2 in a Browser
items.title_zh: 在浏览器中运行的《半条命 2》
items.summary_en: A browser-based recreation of Valve's classic runs Half-Life 2 in the browser, showcasing a WebAssembly/WebGL-style approach to bring a full 3D game to the web without native installs. The project highlights the browser’s growing capacity to host heavy games and preserve classic titles, while also pointing to the performance and licensing trade-offs of in-browser emulation.
items.summary_zh: 在浏览器里直接运行《半条命 2》的演示，展示了通过网页技术将完整 3D 游戏带入浏览器的可能。它凸显了浏览器承载重度游戏与保留经典作品的潜力，同时也暴露了实现此类功能时的性能与授权权衡。

items.title_en: Zig's New BitCast Semantics and LLVM Back End Improvements
items.title_zh: Zig 的 BitCast 语义与 LLVM 后端改进
items.summary_en: The Zig language project updates BitCast semantics and LLVM backend. The changes aim to make bit-level casts safer and more predictable while improving code generation and optimization on the LLVM backend, helping Zig reach more production-grade use cases.
items.summary_zh: 开发团队对 Zig 的 BitCast 语义进行了更新，并对 LLVM 后端进行了改进。修改旨在让位运算强制转换更安全、行为更可预测，同时提升 LLVM 后端的代码生成和优化能力，推动 Zig 在生产环境中的应用。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What surprised you about Estonia e-Residency and running an Estonian OÜ?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：对爱沙尼亚电子居留与在爱沙尼亚注册公司有哪些惊喜？
items.summary_en: Community responses discuss the practical realities of Estonia's e-Residency and running an Estonian OÜ, including onboarding, banking, taxation, and regulatory burdens. The thread surfaces surprising pros and cons, like ease of international business but complexities around banking and EU rules.
items.summary_zh: 社区讨论爱沙尼亚电子居留与在爱沙尼亚注册公司（OÜ）的实际情况，包括开户、银行、税务与监管负担等。讨论揭示了一些出人意料的利弊，例如跨境经营的便利性与银行及欧盟规则的复杂性。

items.title_en: Tell HN: OpenAI has started putting ads on paid programs
items.title_zh: Tell HN：OpenAI 已在付费计划中投放广告
items.summary_en: OpenAI reportedly started showing ads in some paid programs, prompting criticism about monetization and user experience. The move raises questions about how AI companies balance revenue with value, and potential conflicts of interest.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 在部分付费计划中开始投放广告，引发关于商业化与用户体验的争议。此举将引发对 AI 公司在创收与用户价值之间平衡的质疑，以及潜在的利益冲突。

items.title_en: Dolphin Emulator Progress Release 2606
items.title_zh: Dolphin 模拟器进展发布 2606
items.summary_en: Dolphin Emulator's 2606 progress release brings improved compatibility, performance tweaks, and bug fixes for various GameCube/Wii titles. The update highlights ongoing maintenance and community-driven progress in open-source emulation.
items.summary_zh: Dolphin 模拟器 2606 版在兼容性、性能调整和若干 bug 修复方面取得进展，覆盖多款 GameCube/Wii 游戏。此更新体现了开源仿真项目的持续维护与社区驱动的进步。

items.title_en: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
items.title_zh: OpenAI 发布首个定制芯片，由 Broadcom 打造
items.summary_en: OpenAI has unveiled its first custom silicon, built in partnership with Broadcom. The move signals a shift toward owning more of the hardware stack to optimize model serving and efficiency, potentially reducing reliance on Nvidia GPUs. If successful, it could reshape cloud economics and push competitors to accelerate in-house hardware efforts.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 公布了首款定制芯片，与 Broadcom 合作打造，旨在优化自家模型的推理与训练性能。此举标志对硬件环节更深度掌控，可能降低对外部供应商的依赖，并影响云端成本与定价竞争。

items.title_en: Anthropic says Alibaba illicitly extracted Claude AI model capabilities
items.title_zh: Anthropic称阿里巴巴非法提取Claude AI模型能力
items.summary_en: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of illicitly extracting Claude's capabilities, alleging IP theft and copying of proprietary model features. The claim highlights tensions over access to foundation-model technology and could affect licensing, partnerships, and regulatory scrutiny as Alibaba expands its AI stack. If proven, it could spur litigation and reshape cross-border AI collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 指控阿里巴巴非法提取 Claude 模型的能力，指控涉及知识产权和对专有特征的盗取。此举凸显基础模型领域对接入方式的激烈竞争和潜在法律风险，可能影响许可、伙伴关系及合规审查。若指控成立，可能引发诉讼并重塑跨境 AI 合作格局。

items.title_en: Wikipedia Workers in Britain set global first by seeking union recognition
items.title_zh: 英国维基百科员工寻求工会承认，成全球首例
items.summary_en: UK Wikipedia workers are seeking union recognition, marking a global first in this context. The move signals growing momentum for labor organizing within tech-enabled knowledge platforms and could influence working conditions, pay, and remote-work policies across related organizations.
items.summary_zh: 英国维基百科工作人员寻求承认工会地位，成为这一领域的全球首例。此举反映出科技驱动知识平台中劳动组织的日益增长势头，可能影响工作条件、薪酬和远程工作等政策。

items.title_en: As banks close accounts, experts point to immigration crackdown
items.title_zh: 银行关闭账户？专家指向移民打击
items.summary_en: Experts say bank account closures are increasingly tied to broader immigration enforcement, with banks wary of customers' residency status.
items.summary_zh: 专家指出，银行关闭账户与更广泛的移民执法日益相关，银行对客户居留身份保持警惕。文章强调这对移民和依赖金融服务的小型企业造成的影响，并提出对合规负担的质疑。

items.title_en: Blogging can just be stating the obvious
items.title_zh: 博客也可以只是把显而易见的事情说清楚
items.summary_en: The author argues that blogging doesn't have to chase novelty; crisp, clear articulation of obvious ideas can be valuable for documenting and clarifying thinking. Consistency and practical sharing often outweigh grandiose takes, lowering the barrier to regular writing.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为博客不必追逐新奇，清晰表达显而易见的观点本身也有价值，有助于记录与梳理思路。坚持输出、强调实用性往往比追逐轰动观点更能推动持续写作。

items.title_en: Cloudflare launched self-managed OAuth for all
items.title_zh: Cloudflare推出面向所有人的自托管OAuth
items.summary_en: Cloudflare announces a self-managed OAuth offering deployable on customers' own infra, enabling organizations to run their own OAuth provider without relying on Cloudflare-hosted services. This reduces vendor lock-in and lets teams apply their own security controls while preserving standard OAuth flows. It signals a trend toward more self-contained identity infrastructure in the SaaS era.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出可在客户自有基础设施上部署的自托管 OAuth 方案，企业无须依赖 Cloudflare 托管的服务即可搭建自己的认证提供者。此举有助于降低对单一厂商的依赖，并让团队把安全策略掌控在自己手中，同时保持标准的 OAuth 流程。它体现了在 SaaS 时代对更自主身份基础设施的需求。

items.title_en: We’re making Bunny DNS free
items.title_zh: Bunny DNS 免费开放
items.summary_en: Bunny DNS announces it will make its domain name system service free, lowering the barrier for personal sites and startups to adopt fast, resilient DNS. The move could pressure competitors to offer similar free tiers and raises questions about sustainability and future monetization.
items.summary_zh: Bunny DNS 将其域名解析服务免费化，降低个人站点和初创企业采用高效 DNS 的门槛。此举可能对竞争对手施压，促使行业普遍提供免费层，但也引发对未来盈利模式与可持续性的担忧。

items.title_en: Apple just Increased Prices: here’s what’s changed
items.title_zh: 苹果再涨价：具体变化一览
items.summary_en: MacRumors outlines exactly what Apple changed in its pricing, which SKUs were affected and by how much. The piece helps consumers and retailers understand the real impact of the price uptick across devices and regions.
items.summary_zh: MacRumors 详细梳理了苹果价格调整的具体变化、受影响的型号及涨价幅度，帮助消费者和零售商理解此次涨价在各设备与区域上的实际影响。

items.title_en: There are a few things that I look back on as my mistakes in the early days
items.title_zh: 我早年的几件错误回顾
items.summary_en: John Carmack looks back on a handful of early-career mistakes and distills practical lessons for builders. He emphasizes shipping over perfection, staying disciplined, and learning from feedback to move faster. The reflections offer candid, actionable guidance for ambitious developers.
items.summary_zh: Carmack 回顾早期的几次错误，并总结给开发者的可执行教训：要先落地、避免因追求完美而拖延，并从反馈中快速迭代。这样的分享为野心勃勃的开发者提供了朴实且实用的指导。

items.title_en: Show HN: Turn native language audio into flashcards and shadowing practice
items.title_zh: Show HN：将母语音频转化为单词卡和跟读练习
items.summary_en: Lingochunk offers a tool that converts native-language audio into flashcards and shadowing prompts for language learning. It enables rapid creation of practice material from real conversations, lowering barrier to immersion.
items.summary_zh: Lingochunk 提供的工具可将母语对话音频转化为单词卡和跟读练习材料，使学习者能够从真实对话中快速生成练习内容，降低沉浸式学习的门槛。

items.title_en: LuaJIT 3.0 proposed syntax extensions
items.title_zh: LuaJIT 3.0 的语法扩展提议
items.summary_en: Proposed syntax extensions for LuaJIT 3.0 aim to improve ergonomics and performance, potentially adding new syntactic sugar while staying compatible. The discussion shows ongoing effort to evolve LuaJIT without sacrificing its speed-focused niche.
items.summary_zh: LuaJIT 3.0 的社区提出语法扩展的提案，旨在提升可用性和性能，可能加入新的语法糖，同时保持向后兼容。这一讨论体现了在不牺牲高性能的前提下，对 LuaJIT 生态的持续演化。

items.title_en: RubyLLM: A Ruby framework for all major AI providers
items.title_zh: RubyLLM：面向所有主流 AI 提供商的 Ruby 框架
items.summary_en: RubyLLM provides a unified Ruby framework for major AI providers, letting developers write provider-agnostic code and swap backends with minimal changes. The move highlights how language ecosystems are competing on developer ergonomics as AI tooling expands.
items.summary_zh: RubyLLM 提供一个统一接口，让 Ruby 开发者在不同主要 AI 提供商之间切换时无需重写代码。通过消除厂商绑定，它可能加速 Ruby 在 AI 应用的落地，并反映出各语言生态在开发者体验上的竞争。

items.title_en: 45°C cooling design cuts data center water use to near zero
items.title_zh: 英伟达的 45°C 冷却设计将数据中心用水量降至近零
items.summary_en: NVIDIA outlines a cooling strategy that uses 45°C water to remove heat, dramatically cutting data center water use and enabling simpler plumbing. The approach could lower OPEX for AI/data workloads and influence future data center infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达介绍了一种使用 45°C 的热水进行散热的设计，显著降低数据中心的用水量并简化管路。该方案有望降低 AI/数据工作负载的数据中心运营成本，并可能影响未来的基础设施设计。

items.title_en: Windows 10 quietly gets one more year of support and updates
items.title_zh: Windows 10 静默再获得一年支持与更新
items.summary_en: Microsoft extends Windows 10 support by another year, meaning ongoing security updates and bug fixes despite Windows 11's dominance.
items.summary_zh: 微软宣布 Windows 10 将再获一年官方支持与更新，尽管 Windows 11 处于主导地位，仍可获得安全更新与错误修复。

items.title_en: Ending respiratory infections
items.title_zh: 结束呼吸道感染的综合策略
items.summary_en: The piece argues for a comprehensive public-health approach to ending respiratory infections, likely advocating vaccines, sanitation, surveillance, and global health coordination to reduce disease burden.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出消除呼吸道感染的综合公共卫生策略，包括疫苗接种、卫生与监测、全球协作及相关政策改革，强调从长远看带来的社会与经济收益。

items.title_en: SoftBank 2026 AGM [pdf]
items.title_zh: 软银 2026 年股东大会材料（PDF）
items.summary_en: SoftBank released its 2026 AGM materials, outlining strategy and performance across the group. The document highlights how SoftBank plans to manage the Vision Fund, AI bets, and portfolio diversification, with emphasis on growth sectors and financial discipline.
items.summary_zh: SoftBank 公布了 2026 年股东大会材料，概述集团层面的战略与业绩。材料聚焦 Vision Fund 的投资方向、对 AI 领域的布局，以及投资组合的多元化与财务纪律。

items.title_en: The Xteink X4 E-Ink Reader
items.title_zh: The Xteink X4 电子墨水阅读器
items.summary_en: Xteink's new X4 e-ink reader aims to deliver improved contrast and usability for long-form reading, with low power consumption and potential note-taking features. It exemplifies ongoing viability and breadth of e-ink devices in a market increasingly dominated by tablets.
items.summary_zh: Xteink 的新款 X4 电子墨水阅读器致力于提升对比度与可读性，兼具低功耗与潜在的笔记功能，展示了电子纸设备在平板主导的市场中的持续可行性与广度。

items.title_en: Medical students are using popular research tool to pump out misleading studies
items.title_zh: 医学生利用热门研究工具炮制误导性研究
items.summary_en: Medical students are allegedly using a popular research tool to generate misleading studies, exposing vulnerabilities in how easily AI-assisted or automated tools can distort medical literature. The incident underscores the need for stronger verification, education, and safeguards in research workflows.
items.summary_zh: 据称医学生在流行的研究工具中快速生成误导性研究，暴露了 AI 辅助工具对医学文献造成扭曲的风险。此事强调需要加强核查、教育与研究工作流中的安全防护。

items.title_en: Elastic lays off 7% of employees
items.title_zh: Elastic宣布裁员7%
items.summary_en: Elastic announced layoffs totaling about 7% of its employees as it reshapes the company toward profitability and cloud-centric growth. The leadership aims to reduce operating costs, simplify the org, and accelerate product delivery, with some roles impacted across functions.
items.summary_zh: Elastic 宣布裁减约 7% 的员工，以重塑为更偏向云端的增长模式并提升盈利能力。管理层表示将精简运营、加速产品交付，裁员涉及多个职能领域的岗位。

items.title_en: Computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 引入“计算机使用”能力
items.summary_en: Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash adds a 'computer use' capability, letting the model interact with a host environment to run commands, access files, and call tools. This expands AI agents from theory to action, boosting productivity while expanding safety and privacy considerations. It signals a broader trend toward tool-using assistants.
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 增强了“使用计算机”的能力，使模型能够在宿主环境中运行命令、访问文件和调用工具。这让 AI 代理从单纯的推理走向对外部世界的实际行动，同时也带来安全与隐私方面的新挑战。这标志着更强大、能调用外部工具的 AI 助手正成为趋势。

items.title_en: Zombie unicorns are haunting Silicon Valley
items.title_zh: 僵尸独角兽正在困扰硅谷
items.summary_en: Zombie unicorns refer to startups that retain billion-dollar valuations while burning cash and showing weak fundamentals, propped up by a late-stage funding appetite. The piece argues this dynamic distorts capital markets and may force a reckoning in Silicon Valley as funding conditions tighten.
items.summary_zh: 所谓‘僵尸独角兽’指在资金持续支撑下仍维持十亿美元级估值、但基本面薄弱的初创企业。此现象扭曲资本市场，随着融资环境收紧，硅谷可能面临重新定价与投资谨慎的局面。

items.title_en: Show HN: Secs-man, a secrets manager you can (not) rely on
items.title_zh: Show HN：Secs-man——一个你不能（也不应）依赖的密钥管理器
items.summary_en: Secs-man is a Rust-based secrets manager designed as a cautionary example about the fragility of secrets handling. It surface flaws and risk scenarios to help developers think more critically about security, auditability, and supply chain.
items.summary_zh: Secs-man 是一个用 Rust 编写的秘密管理器，作为对秘密管理脆弱性的警示性示例。它揭示了潜在缺陷与风险情景，促使开发者在安全性、可审计性以及供应链方面进行更细致的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: Nub – A Bun-like all-in-one toolkit for Node.js
items.title_zh: Show HN：Nub——一个 Bun 风格的 Node.js 全能工具包
items.summary_en: Nub is a Bun-like toolkit for Node.js, providing a single binary with ecosystem utilities, bundling, package management, and more. If adopted, it could reshape local dev environments and reduce dependency friction for Node developers.
items.summary_zh: Nub 将 Node.js 开发环境整合成一个 Bun 风格的工具包，包含运行时、包管理和常用开发工具，简化本地环境。若获得广泛采用，可能降低依赖冲突、提升上手速度，并推动 Node 生态的工具链整合。

items.title_en: PR spam today looks like email spam in the early 2000s
items.title_zh: PR 垃圾邮件如今看起来像 2000 年代初的邮件垃圾
items.summary_en: PR outreach today mirrors early-2000s email spam, with generic, mass-targeted pitches and clickbait subject lines. The piece argues that quality, relevance, and user respect in PR is eroding, creating noise that developers and journalists skip.
items.summary_zh: 如今的公关推送像上世纪初的邮件垃圾一样泛滥、缺乏针对性，充满低质的标题与大规模群发。文章指出，PR 的质量与对用户的尊重正在下降，造成开发者和记者对信息的忽略。

items.title_en: Qualcomm to Acquire Modular
items.title_zh: 高通将收购 Modular
items.summary_en: Qualcomm plans to acquire Modular, an AI startup focused on modular software for on-device or edge AI. The deal expands Qualcomm's AI software and hardware stack, aiming to boost on-device inference and system integration. It underscores a trend of chipmakers consolidating to offer end-to-end edge AI solutions.
items.summary_zh: 高通计划收购专注于在设备端运行的模组化 AI 软件的初创公司 Modular。此次交易扩展了高通在 AI 软件与硬件的整合能力，旨在提升设备端推理性能和系统协同。此举反映芯片厂商在边缘 AI 解决方案上的并购整合趋势。

items.title_en: Stealing Is a Skill
items.title_zh: 盗窃是一门技能
items.summary_en: Reflects on the craft of stealing as a skill, analyzing how attackers cultivate methods and how defenders can adapt. The piece emphasizes practical lessons for security professionals and the importance of empathy to understand attacker mindset.
items.summary_zh: 文章从攻击者角度探讨盗窃这门技能，分析他们如何培养手段以及防守方如何应对。强调对安全从业者的现实教训以及理解攻击者思维的重要性。

items.title_en: The Unbearable Cheapness of Open Weight Models
items.title_zh: 开源权重模型的难以承受的便宜
items.summary_en: The Unbearable Cheapness of Open Weight Models argues that while open-weight LLMs dramatically reduce runtime API costs and vendor lock-in, there are hidden costs in compute, energy, governance, and safety. Open weights enable experimentation but shift responsibility to maintain and secure models.
items.summary_zh: 《开源权重模型的难以承受的便宜》指出，开源权重模型虽然显著降低运行成本和对供应商的依赖，但也带来计算、能耗、治理与安全等隐性成本。开放权重促成更多实验，却把维护与安全责任转移到用户端。

items.title_en: Mixing Visual and Textual Code
items.title_zh: 混合可视化与文本代码
items.summary_en: The arXiv paper explores combining visual representations with textual code to improve comprehension and collaboration in programming. It discusses design considerations, benefits, and potential pitfalls of hybrid code modalities.
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文探讨用视觉表示与文本代码相结合来提升编程的理解与协作，讨论了混合代码形式的设计要点、潜在好处以及可能的风险。

items.title_en: Krea 2: SOTA open-weights 12B image model
items.title_zh: Krea 2：12B 开源权重的图像模型达到 SOTA
items.summary_en: Krea 2 releases an open-weight 12B image model that achieves state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks. The open weights lower barriers to experimentation and allow researchers and startups to fine-tune and deploy more freely. The development underscores the rapid progress and growing impact of open-model ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Krea 2 发布了具开源权重的 12B 图像模型，在多个基准上达到最新性能。开源权重降低了实验门槛，研究人员和初创企业可以更自由地微调与部署。该进展凸显了开放模型生态的快速成长及影响力。

items.title_en: You can't unit test for taste
items.title_zh: 你不能用单元测试来评估口味
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that taste is subjective and utterly not amenable to unit tests. The piece suggests focusing on objective signals and user outcomes instead of chasing 'favorable' taste in software design, as taste evolves with context.
items.summary_zh: 文章直指口味本质的主观性，认为无法通过单元测试来衡量。作者建议在软件设计中以客观信号和用户实际效果为核心，而不是去追求所谓的“好口味”，因为口味会随情境改变。

items.title_en: Running Windows Games on a Hobby OS with Wine
items.title_zh: 在业余操作系统上用 Wine 运行 Windows 游戏
items.summary_en: A hobby OS runs Windows games via Wine, with notes on compatibility and performance versus native tooling. It demonstrates how open-source ecosystems push practical cross-platform gaming, even on niche hardware.
items.summary_zh: 该项目演示在业余操作系统上通过 Wine 运行 Windows 游戏，并给出兼容性与性能的综合评估。体现开源生态在跨平台游戏体验中的实际应用潜力。

items.title_en: The A.I.-Design Aesthetic That's Taking over the Internet
items.title_zh: 席卷全网的人工智能设计美学
items.summary_en: The New Yorker article argues that an AI-driven design aesthetic—with vibrant gradients, abstract shapes, and machine-generated textures—has become ubiquitous online. It analyzes how this aesthetic shapes interfaces, branding, and user expectations, for better or worse.
items.summary_zh: 《纽约客》指出，AI 驱动的设计美学正普遍渗透网络，以鲜艳渐变、抽象形状和机器生成纹理为特征。文章分析了这一美学如何影响界面设计、品牌形象与用户期望，其利弊各有侧重。

items.title_en: Exploiting vulnerabilities in Johnson and Johnson web apps
items.title_zh: Exploiting vulnerabilities in Johnson and Johnson web apps
items.summary_en: Security researchers describe vulnerabilities in Johnson & Johnson's web apps, illustrating healthcare IT risk and the urgency of timely patching and secure development practices. The disclosure underscores the fragile surface of consumer health platforms.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究人员揭示强生网页应用中的漏洞，凸显医疗健康 IT 的风险以及及时打补丁与安全开发实践的紧迫性。此类披露强调了消费者健康平台易受攻击的脆弱面。

items.title_en: Zero-Downtime Deployments with Docker Compose – No Kubernetes Required
items.title_zh: 使用 Docker Compose 实现零停机部署——无需 Kubernetes
items.summary_en: StatusDude shows how to achieve zero-downtime deployments with Docker Compose without Kubernetes, using blue/green deployments, load balancer strategies, and health checks.
items.summary_zh: StatusDude 的教程展示如何在不使用 Kubernetes 的情况下，利用 Docker Compose 实现零停机部署，包含蓝绿发布、负载均衡与健康检查等策略。

items.title_en: GLM-5.2 is a step change for open agents
items.title_zh: GLM-5.2：开放代理的质变
items.summary_en: GLM-5.2 represents a significant leap for open AI agents, improving reasoning, planning, and tool-use capabilities in open-weight models. This advancement lowers the barrier to building capable open agents and accelerates community experimentation and innovation.
items.summary_zh: GLM-5.2 对开放代理来说是一次显著跃升，提升了推理、计划和工具使用能力的开放模型。这一进步降低了构建强大开放代理的门槛，推动社区在实验与创新方面的进展。

items.title_en: What I'm Finding About LLM Code Style and Token Costs
items.title_zh: 我在 LLM 代码风格与令牌成本方面的发现
items.summary_en: What I'm Finding About LLM Code Style and Token Costs discusses observations about code style in LLM-generated code and the token costs associated with generating or editing code. It offers tips for writing prompts, caching results, and structuring code to reduce tokens while preserving readability and correctness.
items.summary_zh: 记录了在使用大语言模型生成代码时对风格的一些观察以及与令牌成本相关的经验。给出将风格标准化、精简提示和重复代码以降低令牌数量的实用建议。

items.title_en: Writers and Drugs
items.title_zh: 作家与药物
items.summary_en: Writers and Drugs discusses vulnerabilities writers face regarding alcohol and drugs, drawing on literary culture and personal narratives. It addresses impact on creativity, productivity, and wellbeing, urging empathy and better support for writers.
items.summary_zh: 本文讨论作家在文学创作圈中对酒精与药物的易感性，结合个人叙事与文化背景分析其对创作与健康的影响。呼吁提供更多支持、降低污名化并关注心理健康。

items.title_en: Aisle Discovers 6 New CVEs in Curl, Including the Oldest Issue Ever Reported
items.title_zh: Aisle 发现 Curl 的六个新 CVE，其中包含史上最早的问题
items.summary_en: Aisle discovers six new CVEs in curl, including an issue reportedly the oldest ever recorded. The disclosure highlights the ongoing need to patch foundational libraries and the challenges of maintaining security across broad-dependency ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Aisle 发现 Curl 的六个新 CVE，其中还包括被认为是有史以来最早的漏洞。这一披露凸显了对基础库持续打补丁的需求，以及维护庞大依赖生态系统安全的挑战。

items.title_en: Dostoyevsky isn't difficult
items.title_zh: 《陀思妥耶夫斯基》其实并不难读
items.summary_en: The author argues Dostoyevsky isn't as hard to read as common wisdom suggests, offering practical reading approaches, translation choices, and pacing to make the novels approachable. The piece lowers barriers for readers and students to tackle classic literature.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张《陀思妥耶夫斯基》其实并不如人们想象中那么难读，提供可行的阅读策略、译本选择与节奏建议，帮助读者更易接触经典文学。文章旨在降低门槛，鼓励读者和学生去阅读。

items.title_en: Bohemia Interactive: Cold War Assault Remastered Source Code on GitHub
items.title_zh: Bohemia Interactive：Cold War Assault Remastered 源代码在 GitHub 开源
items.summary_en: Bohemia Interactive released the Cold War Assault Remastered source code on GitHub, inviting modders and researchers to examine the engine and tools. This mirrors a broader trend of open-sourcing legacy game code to spur experimentation, while raising questions about licensing and attribution.
items.summary_zh: Bohemia Interactive 将 Cold War Assault Remastered 的源代码发布到 GitHub，供社区研究引擎与工具。此举反映了开源遗留游戏代码以推动探索的趋势，同时也引发版权与署名方面的讨论。

items.title_en: Markdy: Like Mermaid Diagrams, but for Motion
items.title_zh: Markdy：像 Mermaid 图一样处理运动
items.summary_en: Markdy offers a textual DSL resembling Mermaid diagrams but focused on motion and animation workflows. It lets creators describe timing, transitions, and dependencies in a readable format, producing diagrams that aid planning and collaboration on complex motion systems.
items.summary_zh: Markdy 提供一种类似 Mermaid 的文本语言，专注于运动与动画工作流。它让创作者用易读的格式描述时序、过渡和依赖，生成的图表有助于规划与协同处理复杂的运动系统。

items.title_en: Show HN: Monolisa v3 – a typeface for developers and creatives
items.title_zh: Show HN：Monolisa v3 — 面向开发者与创意工作者的字体
items.summary_en: Show HN: Monolisa v3 – a typeface for developers and creatives introduces a new font optimized for code editors and design work. It highlights typography choices tailored to readability and aesthetics for tech users.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Monolisa v3——为开发者与创意工作者设计的新字体，强调在代码编辑与设计工作中的可读性与美感的字体选择。

items.title_en: Puzzling Success of Overparameterization: Lottery Tickets or Escape Dimensions?
items.title_zh: 过参数化的成功之谜：乐透票理论还是维度逃逸？
items.summary_en: An EPFL study investigates why overparameterized models train so well, weighing lottery ticket explanations against the idea of escaping to low-dimensional manifolds. The work suggests multiple mechanisms may underpin success, with implications for pruning, architecture design, and generalization.
items.summary_zh: EPFL 的研究探讨了为何过参数化模型能训练得如此出色，权衡乐透票假说与“逃逸到低维流形”的解释。研究表明可能存在多种机制共同作用，这对剪枝、网络结构设计和泛化能力具有重要启示。

items.title_en: A Practical Guide to SSH Tunnels: Local and Remote Port Forwarding
items.title_zh: SSH 隧道实用指南：本地与远程端口转发
items.summary_en: Offers a hands-on walkthrough of SSH local and remote port forwarding, with real-world use cases from secure access to services behind firewalls. Includes concrete command examples and tips to avoid common pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 提供 SSH 本地与远程端口转发的实用指南，涵盖穿透防火墙、通过跳板机访问受限服务等场景，并给出具体命令示例与常见坑点提示。

items.title_en: Why eval startups fail (2025)
items.title_zh: 评估型初创企业为何失败（2025）
items.summary_en: Examines why evaluation-focused startups struggle to scale in 2025, highlighting issues like ambiguous value propositions, high customer acquisition costs, and data or compliance hurdles. It distills actionable lessons for founders, investors, and ecosystem builders to improve go-to-market discipline and unit economics.
items.summary_zh: 分析了2025年以评估服务为核心的初创企业为何难以扩张，指出价值定位不清、获客成本高、数据与合规风险等常见问题。提供对创始人、投资人和生态建设者的可操作建议，帮助提升市场定位与单位经济效益。

items.title_en: Matt's Script Archive: The Scripts That Reshaped the Web
items.title_zh: Matt's Script Archive：改变了网页的脚本
items.summary_en: Tedium looks back at Matt's Script Archive, a collection of early 1990s web scripts that popularized client-side effects like hit counters, blinking text, and image rollovers, shaping web design culture.
items.summary_zh: 特刊回顾 Matt's Script Archive，这批1990年代初的网页脚本推动了客户端效果（如计数器、闪烁文本、图像翻转等），深刻影响了早期的网站设计与开发者文化。

items.title_en: Lies, Damn Lies and Database Benchmarks
items.title_zh: 数据库基准测试的谎言与真相
items.summary_en: QuestDB argues benchmarks for databases are often misleading without transparent workloads and representative data. The post unpacks pitfalls like cherry-picked tests, hardware bias, and the gap between synthetic metrics and real-world performance.
items.summary_zh: QuestDB 指出数据库基准测试若缺乏透明的工作负载与真实数据代表性，往往会产生误导。文中揭示了挑选性测试、硬件偏差，以及合成指标与实际场景性能之间的差距等问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Nimic – Pure Python as a systems language with AOT compilation
items.title_zh: Show HN：Nimic——带 AOT 编译的纯 Python 系统语言
items.summary_en: Nimic presents pure Python as a systems language with ahead-of-time compilation, aiming to marry Python's simplicity with lower-level performance. It demonstrates an approach where Python-like syntax compiles to efficient, systems-level code, potentially broadening options for performance-critical projects.
items.summary_zh: Nimic 将 Python 作为系统语言并提供 AOT 编译，旨在将 Python 的简洁性与更接近底层的性能相结合。它展示了用类似 Python 的语法编译成高效的系统级代码的路径，可能为对性能敏感的项目带来新选项。

items.title_en: AWS Lambda Introduces MicroVMs
items.title_zh: AWS Lambda 推出 MicroVMs
items.summary_en: AWS Lambda now supports MicroVMs, providing isolated sandboxes with full lifecycle control for serverless workloads. The move could improve security, performance predictability, and allow user-custom runtimes, marking a step toward more flexible serverless architectures.
items.summary_zh: AWS Lambda 推出 MicroVMs，提供具备完整生命周期控制的隔离沙箱，用于无服务器工作负载。此举有望提升安全性、性能可预测性，并支持自定义运行时。

items.title_en: Crawling BitTorrent DHTs for Fun and Profit [pdf]
items.title_zh: 为乐与利润：对 BitTorrent DHT 的爬取研究
items.summary_en: Researchers describe scalable techniques for crawling BitTorrent's DHT to map peers and content, enabling large-scale measurement of decentralized file sharing. While providing valuable insights into network dynamics and resilience, the work also raises privacy and abuse concerns.
items.summary_zh: 这篇研究论文提出对 BitTorrent DHT 进行大规模爬取的技术方法，用以观测对等节点、内容分布和网络动态。研究提供了对去中心化文件分享的可观测性与鲁棒性见解，同时也暴露了隐私与滥用的风险。

items.title_en: 15 sorting algorithms in 6 minutes (2013) [video]
items.title_zh: 六分钟看懂 15 种排序算法（2013）视频
items.summary_en: 15 sorting algorithms are demonstrated in a six-minute video from 2013, offering a fast tour of algorithm variety, Big-O tradeoffs, and stability. It's a compact visual refresher for students and professionals revisiting sorting theory.
items.summary_zh: 2013 年的一个视频在六分钟内演示了 15 种排序算法，提供对各自时间复杂度、稳定性和实现差异的直观对比，是学习和复习排序理论的紧凑资料。

items.title_en: Words, Words, Words
items.title_zh: 文字，文字，文字：AI 与文学的共作者观
items.summary_en: An essay arguing that AI can be a fellow wordsmith and complement human authors in literature, not a rival. It envisions AI assisting with writing, editing, and world-building, while preserving human creativity.
items.summary_zh: 一篇论述认为 AI 可以成为文学领域的同道词匠，帮助写作、编辑和世界观构建，而不是人类创作者的对手，同时保留人类的创造力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Wordit – Change One Letter, Keep the Chain Going
items.title_zh: Show HN：Wordit – 只改一个字母，保持单词链条
items.summary_en: Wordit is a puzzle game where each move changes one letter while keeping the chain valid, offering a lightweight, engaging challenge for word-lovers and algorithm enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: Wordit 是一款游戏：每步只改一个字母，且新词仍然合法，提供轻量但富有挑战性的词谜体验，吸引爱好文字和算法的人士。

items.title_en: I can haz smoller NixOS ISOs?
items.title_zh: 我能得到更小的 NixOS ISO？
items.summary_en: I can haz smoller NixOS ISOs? discusses efforts to produce smaller installation images for NixOS, focusing on reducing image size and footprint, and the trade-offs with feature completeness and build configurations.
items.summary_zh: 讨论为 NixOS 制作更小的安装镜像的尝试，聚焦于减小镜像体积与保留核心功能之间的权衡，以及可能的构建配置与实现路径。

items.title_en: Pull request limits are cutting down the noise
items.title_zh: Pull request 限制正在降低噪声
items.summary_en: Raising PR limits helps maintainers focus on meaningful changes and reduces review fatigue. By throttling contributed changes, teams can speed up CI cycles and improve code quality. The piece shares practical guidelines for applying limits without stifling collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 提升拉取请求限制有助于维护者专注于有意义的改动，降低评审疲劳。通过对提交数量设限，团队可以加快持续集成循环并提升代码质量。文章给出在不扼杀协作的前提下落实现限的方法与要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Write SaaS apps where users control where their data is stored
items.title_zh: Show HN：让用户决定数据存放位置的 SaaS 应用
items.summary_en: Show HN presents Write SaaS apps where users control where their data is stored, showcasing architectural approaches to support data residency. The approach helps satisfy compliance and data sovereignty needs while offering flexibility and potential performance trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了让用户决定数据存放地点的 SaaS 应用设计思路，体现支持数据居留的架构方法。该方案有利于满足合规与数据主权需求，同时带来灵活性和潜在的性能权衡。

items.title_en: How the Fifth Lateran Council unlocked financial theory
items.title_zh: 第五次拉特兰公会议如何影响金融理论的发展
items.summary_en: The Fifth Lateran Council reframed lending as a virtuous activity, shaping early modern financial thinking by legitimizing debt and interest. This historical shift helped pave the way for later financial theory and economic innovation.
items.summary_zh: 第五次拉特兰公会议将放贷视为德行行为，改变了对利息和债务的道德评判，推动早期现代金融思想的发展。这一历史转折为后来的金融理论与经济创新铺平了道路。

items.title_en: The Disappearance of Japan's Animators
items.title_zh: 日本动画师的消失
items.summary_en: The Economist reports a troubling exodus of Japan's animators driven by low pay, long hours, and outsourcing pressures. The piece maps how talent drain threatens production pace, quality, and the future of domestic animation.
items.summary_zh: 《经济学人》报道日本动画师大量流失，原因包括低薪、长工时和外包压力。文章分析了人才外流对产出速度、质量以及日本动漫产业未来的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: StartupsBR – A map of Brazilian startups
items.title_zh: Show HN：StartupsBR——巴西初创企业地图
items.summary_en: StartupsBR visualizes the Brazilian startup ecosystem with a map, highlighting clusters, funding rounds, and sectors. Useful for founders and investors exploring LATAM opportunities.
items.summary_zh: StartupsBR 用地图直观呈现巴西初创企业生态，标注聚集区、融资阶段与行业分布等信息，为希望把握拉美创新机会的创始人和投资者提供洞察。

items.title_en: Tw-fade: pure CSS scroll-driven edge masking
items.title_zh: Tw-fade：纯 CSS 滚动驱动的边缘遮罩
items.summary_en: Tw-fade demonstrates a pure CSS technique for scroll-driven edge masking, enabling subtle fade effects on scroll without JavaScript. It showcases how CSS variables and lightweight techniques can deliver dynamic UI polish with zero script.
items.summary_zh: Tw-fade 展示了一种纯 CSS 的滚动驱动边缘遮罩实现，滚动时可以实现微妙的渐变效果，无需 JavaScript。通过 CSS 变量等轻量化方法，展示了无需脚本即可实现的动态 UI 优雅度。

items.title_en: Lianda and the Long March
items.title_zh: 连大与长征：历史与科技的启示
items.summary_en: A reflective piece pairing the Lianda and Long March narratives, drawing lessons for perseverance and distributed effort in modern tech projects.
items.summary_zh: 这篇博客把“连大”和“长征”的历史故事结合起来，强调在现代科技项目中坚持与分布式协作的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Brain Frog – Can you be random enough for 11 lines of JavaScript?
items.title_zh: Show HN：Brain Frog——用 11 行 JavaScript 能否产生足够随机的结果？
items.summary_en: Brain Frog is a playful Show HN about squeezing randomness from a tiny 11-line JavaScript program, challenging notions of entropy and RNG quality in highly compact code.
items.summary_zh: Brain Frog 是一个有趣的 Show HN 项目，用极简的 11 行 JavaScript 代码尝试产生看似随机的输出，挑战对熵和伪随机数质量的直觉。

items.title_en: Optimizing [sqlx:test] rebuild time
items.title_zh: 优化 [sqlx:test] 重建时间
items.summary_en: Optimizing [sqlx:test] rebuild time describes techniques to speed up test rebuilds in Rust projects using sqlx, likely caching codegen results, avoiding unnecessary rebuilds, and parallelizing tests.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Rust 项目中针对 sqlx:test 的重建时间进行优化的做法，涵盖缓存代码生成、避免无谓重建以及并行化测试等技巧，以缩短 CI 与开发迭代时间。

items.title_en: Shall We Play a Coordination Game?
items.title_zh: 我们来玩一次协调博弈吗？
items.summary_en: Shall We Play a Coordination Game? analyzes how misaligned incentives and coordination failures hamper collective action in technology teams, security, and policy. It offers practical guidance on structuring incentives, protocols, and decision rights to improve collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 《我们来玩一次协调博弈吗？》分析了激励错位与协同失败如何阻碍技术团队、安全与政策领域的集体行动，并提出通过设计激励、协议与决策权来改善协作的实用建议。
